name: Binoculars

description.en: Compares cross-perplexity between two LLMs (an 'observer' and a 'performer') to zero-shot identify machine-generated passages.
description.zh: 通过比较两个语言模型（
与
）的交叉困惑度之比来零样本识别机器生成文本。

paper: Spotting LLMs With Binoculars: Zero-Shot Detection of Machine-Generated Text
authors: Abhimanyu Hans, Avi Schwarzschild, Valeriia Cherepanova, Hamid Kazemi, Aniruddha Saha, Micah Goldblum, Jonas Geiping, Tom Goldstein

name: CoCo

description.en: Enhances detection under low-resource settings by incorporating text coherence signals into a contrastive learning framework.
description.zh: 在低资源场景下，将文本连贯性信号融入对比学习框架以增强检测效果。

paper: CoCo: Coherence-Enhanced Machine-Generated Text Detection Under Low Resource With Contrastive Learning
authors: Xiaoming Liu, Zhaohan Zhang, Yichen Wang, Hang Pu, Yu Lan, Chao Shen

name: DetectGPT

description.en: Perturbs input text and measures probability curvature — machine-generated text tends to occupy local maxima in log-probability space.
description.zh: 对输入文本进行扰动并测量概率曲率——机器生成的文本倾向于占据对数概率空间的局部极大值。

paper: DetectGPT: Zero-Shot Machine-Generated Text Detection using Probability Curvature
authors: Eric Mitchell, Yoonho Lee, Alexander Khazatsky, Christopher D. Manning, Chelsea Finn

name: DeTeCtive

description.en: Employs multi-level contrastive learning (word, sentence, document) to learn fine-grained representations for AI text detection.
description.zh: 采用多层次对比学习（词、句、篇章级别）学习细粒度表征，用于AI生成文本检测。

paper: DeTeCtive: Detecting AI-generated Text via Multi-Level Contrastive Learning
authors: Xun Guo, Shan Zhang, Yongxin He, Ting Zhang, Wanquan Feng, Haibin Huang, Chongyang Ma

name: DNA-DetectLLM

description.en: Applies a DNA-inspired mutation-repair paradigm: mutates text tokens and observes how well a language model 'repairs' them to distinguish human from AI text.
description.zh: 采用DNA启发的突变-修复范式：对文本词元进行突变，观察语言模型的
能力来区分人类与AI文本。

paper: DNA-DetectLLM: Unveiling AI-Generated Text via a DNA-Inspired Mutation-Repair Paradigm
authors: Xiaowei Zhu, Yubing Ren, Fang Fang, Qingfeng Tan, Shi Wang, Yanan Cao

name: DNA-GPT

description.en: Detects GPT-generated text through divergent N-gram analysis — comparing N-gram divergence patterns between the original and re-generated versions.
description.zh: 通过分歧N元组分析检测GPT生成文本——比较原始文本与重新生成版本之间的N-gram分歧模式。

paper: DNA-GPT: Divergent N-Gram Analysis for Training-Free Detection of GPT-Generated Text
authors: Xianjun Yang, Wei Cheng, Yue Wu, Linda Petzold, William Yang Wang, Haifeng Chen

name: Entropy

description.en: Measures average prediction entropy at each token position — machine-generated text often shows lower entropy patterns.
description.zh: 测量每个词元位置的预测熵均值——机器生成文本通常呈现更低的熵分布模式。

paper: N/A
authors: Community Implementations

name: Fast-DetectGPT

description.en: Accelerates DetectGPT by replacing expensive perturbation sampling with conditional probability curvature estimation via a single forward pass.
description.zh: 通过条件概率曲率估计替代昂贵的扰动采样，大幅加速DetectGPT的检测流程。

paper: Fast-DetectGPT: Efficient Detection of Machine-Generated Text via Sampling Discrepancy
authors: Guangsheng Bao, Yanbin Zhao, Zhiyang Teng, Linyi Yang, Yue Zhang

description.en: Loads a locally fine-tuned classification checkpoint as a detector — supports any HuggingFace-compatible model.
description.zh: 加载本地微调的分类检查点作为检测器——支持任何HuggingFace兼容模型。

name: GLTR

description.en: Visualizes and aggregates per-token rank statistics (top-k bucket counts) from a language model to distinguish human from machine text.
description.zh: 通过语言模型逐词排名统计（top-k分桶计数）的可视化与聚合来区分人类与机器文本。

paper: GLTR: Statistical Detection and Visualization of Generated Text
authors: Sebastian Gehrmann, Hendrik Strobelt, Alexander M. Rush

name: GREATER

description.en: Applies adversarial training to harden machine text detectors against text perturbation attacks — the 'Iron Sharpens Iron' approach.
description.zh: 通过对抗训练增强检测器对文本扰动攻击的鲁棒性——以
策略提升防御能力。

paper: Iron Sharpens Iron: Defending Against Attacks in Machine-Generated Text Detection with Adversarial Training
authors: Yuanfan Li, Zhaohan Zhang, Chengzhengxu Li, Chao Shen, Xiaoming Liu

name: ImBD

description.en: Addresses class imbalance in detection data by aligning machine stylistic preferences — 'Imitate Before Detect.'
description.zh: 通过对齐机器文体偏好来处理检测数据中的类不平衡问题——

paper: Aligning Machine Stylistic Preference for Machine-Revised Text Detection
authors: AAAI 2025 Oral: Imitate Before Detect

name: LASTDE

description.en: Mines token probability sequences to detect LLM-generated text without any fine-tuning, using statistical patterns in probability distributions.
description.zh: 通过挖掘词元概率序列中的统计模式来免训练检测LLM生成文本。

paper: Training-free LLM-generated Text Detection by Mining Token Probability Sequences
authors: Yihuai Xu, Yongwei Wang, Yifei Bi, Huangsen Cao, Zhouhan Lin, Yu Zhao, Fei Wu

name: LASTDE++

description.en: An enhanced version of LASTDE with improved probability sequence mining and additional statistical features for stronger detection.
description.zh: LASTDE的增强版本，采用改进的概率序列挖掘方法和额外的统计特征以提升检测能力。

paper: Training-free LLM-generated Text Detection by Mining Token Probability Sequences
authors: Yihuai Xu, Yongwei Wang, Yifei Bi, Huangsen Cao, Zhouhan Lin, Yu Zhao, Fei Wu

name: Likelihood

description.en: Computes the average log-probability of each token under a reference language model as a baseline detection signal.
description.zh: 计算参考语言模型下每个词元的平均对数概率，作为基线检测信号。

paper: N/A
authors: Community Implementations

name: LogRank

description.en: Applies a logarithmic transform to per-token ranks before averaging, providing a more robust baseline metric than raw rank.
description.zh: 对逐词排名取对数后求平均，提供比原始排名更稳健的基线检测指标。

paper: N/A
authors: Community Implementations

name: Longformer

description.en: Uses the Longformer architecture with global attention to classify long documents as human or machine-generated.
description.zh: 利用Longformer的全局注意力架构对长文档进行人类/机器生成文本分类。

paper: Longformer: Long-Document Transformer
authors: Beltagy et al.

name: LRR

description.en: Combines log-likelihood with log-rank information to zero-shot detect machine text, exploiting complementary statistical signals.
description.zh: 结合对数似然与对数排名信息进行零样本检测，利用两种互补的统计信号。

paper: DetectLLM: Leveraging Log Rank Information for Zero-Shot Detection of Machine-Generated Text
authors: Jinyan Su, Terry Yue Zhuo, Di Wang, Preslav Nakov

name: MPU

description.en: Tackles short-text detection through multiscale positive-unlabeled learning, effective even without labeled negative examples.
description.zh: 通过多尺度正样本-无标签学习处理短文本检测任务，即使没有标注负样本也能有效工作。

paper: Multiscale Positive-Unlabeled Detection of AI-Generated Texts
authors: Yuchuan Tian, Hanting Chen, Xutao Wang, Zheyuan Bai, Qinghua Zhang, Ruifeng Li, Chao Xu, Yunhe Wang

name: NPR

description.en: Normalizes prediction probability ratios across nested contexts to detect machine text without any training.
description.zh: 通过在嵌套上下文中归一化预测概率比来零样本检测机器生成文本。

paper: DetectLLM: Leveraging Log Rank Information for Zero-Shot Detection of Machine-Generated Text
authors: Jinyan Su, Terry Yue Zhuo, Di Wang, Preslav Nakov

name: PECOLA

description.en: Bridges selective perturbation with fine-tuned contrastive learning, improving upon DetectGPT's perturbation utilization.
description.zh: 将选择性扰动与微调对比学习相结合，改进了DetectGPT对扰动信息的利用方式。

paper: Does DETECTGPT Fully Utilize Perturbation? Bridging Selective Perturbation to Fine-tuned Contrastive Learning Detector would be Better
authors: Shengchao Liu, Xiaoming Liu*, Yichen Wang, Zehua Cheng, Chengzhengxu Li, Yu Lan, Chao Shen

name: RADAR

description.en: Trains a paraphrase detector jointly with a paraphrase generator to build robustness against common evasion attacks.
description.zh: 联合训练改写检测器与改写生成器，构建对常见规避攻击的鲁棒检测能力。

paper: RADAR: Robust AI-Text Detection via Adversarial Learning
authors: Xiaomeng Hu, Pin-Yu Chen, Tsung-Yi Ho

name: RAIDAR

description.en: Detects AI-generated text by rewriting the input and comparing semantic similarity — human text changes more substantially when rewritten.
description.zh: 通过改写输入文本并比较语义相似度来检测AI生成文本——人类文本被改写后变化更大。

paper: Raidar: geneRative AI Detection viA Rewriting
authors: Chengzhi Mao, Carl Vondrick, Hao Wang, Junfeng Yang

name: Rank

description.en: Uses the average prediction rank of each token as a detection statistic — machine text tends to have lower (better) average ranks.
description.zh: 利用每个词元的平均预测排名作为检测统计量——机器文本通常具有更低的平均排名。

paper: N/A
authors: Community Implementations

name: TOCSIN

description.en: Zero-shot detector that measures token cohesiveness — the consistency of token-level predictions — to identify LLM-generated text.
description.zh: 通过测量词元聚合性（token-level预测的一致性）来零样本识别LLM生成文本。

paper: Zero-Shot Detection of LLM-Generated Text using Token Cohesiveness
authors: Shixuan Ma, Quan Wang
